question: Based on the underlying data values (not the visual slopes), during which period did daily active users increase by the larger amount?

options.C: Both periods have about the same increase
options.D: The change is too small to determine from the chart

explanation: The chart uses a non-linear (inappropriate) y-axis scaling function, so equal vertical distances do not correspond to equal changes in the underlying values. That can make one period look like it changed more even when the data show otherwise. 1991-1993: 3491 → 1010 (change 2481); 1997-1999: 1968 → 5200 (change 3232).
